name: DDZombiesComing
description: Game Description Zombies Coming is a fast-paced survival shooter where the world has fallen into chaos and every road, street, and broken corner of civilization is crawling with the undead. You are one of the last survivors still standing, armed with whatever weapons you can find and the courage to keep moving forward. The zombie outbreak has spread across the city, turning once-familiar places into dangerous battlefields filled with endless waves of monsters. Your mission is simple but brutal: survive, upgrade, fight back, and clear the path before the horde overwhelms you. In this action-packed game, players face waves of zombies that grow
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
